customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals. Yasser is an inbound, motivated customer who called seeking a quote. He is financially activated (bill doubled from ~$249 to ~$500), ideologically primed by a recent seminar framing solar as personal agency, and socially validated by two neighbors who already have panels. He is cooperative and low-resistance.
unresolved_concerns: Title/co-owners status unknown — Parker never asked. If a spouse or co-owner is on the title, they must be present for the close. Closer should confirm at the top of the appointment.
Roof replacement need confirmed by customer ('shingles are rotten') but not formally routed to Ion's roofing team. Closer should surface the roofing conversation and co-route if appropriate.
Utility company is City of Manassas (not Dominion/NOVEC directly) — closer should confirm net metering rules and program eligibility for this specific utility before the proposal.
sensitive_topics_raised: Customer attended a recent seminar where the framing was 'the government won't help you — you have to figure it out yourself.' This ideological frame is a strong motivator and should be acknowledged, not ignored.
Customer's bill has roughly doubled from historical average (~$249 to ~$500) with no explanation — he expressed genuine frustration about this.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for Wednesday at 5:00 PM.
Specialist will 'drop by' (phone appointment — closer should confirm this is a phone call, not an in-person visit, to avoid confusion).
Roof quote will be included / accounted for alongside the solar design.
Customer can text the rep's number to reschedule if needed.
closer_should_know: Yasser is ideologically activated — he came in from a seminar already framing solar as personal action against a system that won't help him, and his bill has doubled with no explanation. He is not a skeptic to be convinced; he is a motivated buyer who needs the numbers to confirm what he already wants to do. Lead with his bill pain and the seminar frame, not with product features. Confirm title/co-owners status immediately — this was not collected by the setter and is the only structural vulnerability in an otherwise clean booking.
